mapper.select: SELECT s.id, s.customer_id, s.total_amount, s.total_cost, s.sale_date, c.name AS customer_name, c.gender AS customer_gender FROM sales s, customers c WHERE s.customer_id = c.id AND s.id = #{id}
SELECT si.id, si.sale_id, si.book_id, b.title AS book_title, si.quantity, si.unit_price, si.unit_cost, si.subtotal FROM sale_items si, books b WHERE si.book_id = b.id AND si.sale_id = #{saleId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sales (customer_id, total_amount, total_cost, sale_date) VALUES (#{customerId}, #{totalAmount}, #{totalCost}, #{saleDate})
INSERT INTO sale_items (sale_id, book_id, quantity, unit_price, unit_cost, subtotal) VALUES (#{saleId}, #{bookId}, #{quantity}, #{unitPrice}, #{unitCost}, #{subtotal})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) > 0 FROM sales WHERE customer_id = #{customerId}
SELECT COUNT(*) > 0 FROM sale_items WHERE book_id = #{bookId}
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(total_amount), 0) FROM sales WHERE DATE(sale_date) = CURRENT_DATE
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sales WHERE DATE(sale_date) = CURRENT_DATE
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(total_amount - total_cost), 0) FROM sales WHERE sale_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate}

SELECT b.id, b.title, b.author, SUM(si.quantity) AS sales_count, SUM(si.quantity * si.unit_price) AS sales_amount FROM sale_items si, books b WHERE si.book_id = b.id GROUP BY b.id, b.title, b.author ORDER BY sales_count DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT YEAR(s.sale_date) AS year, MONTH(s.sale_date) AS month, SUM(s.total_amount) AS total_amount, SUM(s.total_cost) AS total_cost FROM sales s WHERE YEAR(s.sale_date) = #{year} GROUP BY YEAR(s.sale_date), MONTH(s.sale_date) ORDER BY year DESC, month DESC

SELECT YEAR(s.sale_date) AS year, MONTH(s.sale_date) AS month, SUM(s.total_amount) AS total_amount, SUM(s.total_cost) AS total_cost FROM sales s WHERE YEAR(s.sale_date) = #{year} AND MONTH(s.sale_date) BETWEEN #{startMonth} AND #{endMonth} GROUP BY YEAR(s.sale_date), MONTH(s.sale_date) ORDER BY year DESC, month DESC
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(total_amount - total_cost), 0) FROM sales WHERE MONTH(sale_date) = MONTH(CURRENT_DATE) AND YEAR(sale_date) = YEAR(CURRENT_DATE)
mapper.update: UPDATE sales SET total_amount = (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(subtotal), 0) FROM sale_items WHERE sale_id = #{saleId}), total_cost = (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(unit_cost * quantity), 0) FROM sale_items WHERE sale_id = #{saleId}) WHERE id = #{saleId}
mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT s.id, s.customer_id, s.total_amount, s.total_cost, s.sale_date, c.name AS customer_name, c.gender AS customer_gender FROM sales s, customers c, sale_items si WHERE s.customer_id = c.id AND si.sale_id = s.id AND si.book_id = #{bookId} ORDER BY s.sale_date DESC
